projects.description: An app that displays random famous quotes each time a button is clicked, using JavaScript fundamentals like variables, loops, and objects.
Use pagination techniques to display and navigate through a list of 42 students, creating a flexible solution that works with any data set size.
A registration form with JavaScript for customized behavior, conditional interactivity, and real-time input validation with helpful error messages.
technologies: JavaScript (DOM Manipulation, Event handling, Form validation, Accessibility)

projects.description: A browser-based word guessing game using Object-Oriented Programming principles and an onscreen keyboard.
technologies: JavaScript (Object-Oriented programming,DOM Manipulation, Event handling, State management)

projects.description: An employee directory for a fictional company by fetching data from the Random User Generator API and displaying it in an interactive grid with modals.
technologies: JavaScript (Promises, Async & await, DOM manipulation, Arrays methods, Public API integration)

projects.description: A portfolio site using Node.js, Express, and Pug templates to showcase your projects with a modern landing page, about page, and project pages.
Build a modern single-page image gallery app using React, React Router, and the Pixabay API with search functionality and dynamic routing.
Build a web application to manage a library's book collection using Node.js, Express, Pug, SQLite, and the Sequelize ORM.
Create a REST API using Express and Sequelize to administer a school database with user authentication, course management, and CRUD operations.

projects.project_name: Full Stack App with React and a REST API
projects.description: Build a React client for your REST API — a complete full stack app with user authentication, course listing, and full CRUD functionality.
Rebuild the library management app with the help of an AI coding assistant, practicing how to prompt, debug, and refine AI-generated code.
